title: Rising Toxicity
description: A toxic fog rises over 20 days, forcing you to live in the sky and explore below it using gas masks.
body:
# **Rising Toxicity**

Rising Toxicity introduces a toxic fog that rises over a set period of in-game days, forcing players to take to the skys to survive. This mod was designed to take advantage of Create Aeronautics _**(Not Required)**_ by encouraging flying bases.

---

## 🎥 Video
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/AANEY7-mIT0" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

---

## ⚙️ Mechanics:
- Toxic fog rises over time to a set height (default 20 days)  
- Exposure builds in toxic air without a mask → damage at 100%  

- Masks prevent exposure but consume air  
- Masks fog up over time, reducing visibility and forcing you to surface  
- Air tanks refill mask capacity  
- Passive mobs take damage; hostile mobs are immune (Villagers, Wandering Traders, and some others are also immune)  
- Non-immune mobs can't spawn in the toxic fog.  
- Fully multiplayer compatible  
- Configurable heights, timing, and progression via commands  

---

## ⚒️ Items:
- Gas Mask (Tier 1) – 1 tank capacity, 10 minutes of air, fully fogged at 10 minutes  
- Reinforced Mask (Tier 2) – 3 tank capacity, 30 minutes of air, fully fogged at 30 minutes  
- Advanced Mask (Tier 3) – 5 tank capacity, 50 minutes of air, fully fogged at 50 minutes  
- Air Tanks – Used to refill mask air supply, right-click in clean air with an empty tank to refill tank  

---

## 🧾 Commands
- /toxicity getstage – Shows current toxic fog details  
- /toxicity freeze – Pauses fog progression  
- /toxicity unfreeze – Resumes fog progression  
- /toxicity reset – Resets all values and day count  
- /toxicity setday <day> – Sets current day  
- /toxicity setstartheight <Y> – Sets starting height  
- /toxicity setpeakheight <Y> – Sets max height  
- /toxicity setpeakday <days> – Sets days to reach peak  

---
